string 2:
Can I borrow you for a second?
I need your help with something.

I checked the lab to see what Kuga had been up to, and
learned that he released some Digimon in Tokyo.

The documents say that they were Kuramon. They're an
In-Training Digimon, so they're not too dangerous.

But this is Kuga we're dealing with here... so leaving these
Kuramon to roam free may come back to bite us in a big way.

I caught as many as I could, but it doesn't help that it's
Tokyo. Detecting specific Digimon there isn't easy.

Which is what brings me to seek the help
of you, our resident Digimon specialist.

I'd like you to get rid of the Kuramon that
Kuga has skulking around Tokyo.

Don't worry. I'm not asking you to work for free. There'll be
some nice compensation waiting for you once you're done!

...Oops, sorry! Looks like I'm needed elsewhere.
Anyway, I know you've got this.
